summary.para: Calculates a date range from day-based parameters.

The Get-DateRange cmdlet calculates date ranges from simple integer day parameters (olderThan/youngerThan), enabling users to define archival windows without dealing with complex date objects. Returns DateRangeResult objects compatible with PowerShell pipeline chaining.
Number of days in the past for the start of the range (oldest date).
Number of days in the past for the end of the range (newest date). Default is 0 (today).
The date criteria type: CreationDate or ModifiedDate. Default is ModifiedDate.

member.name: M:logManager.Cmdlets.GetDateRangeCmdlet.ProcessRecord
member.summary: Processes the cmdlet request.

member.name: T:logManager.Exceptions.CompressionException
member.summary: Exception thrown when compression operations fail. This includes failures from both 7-Zip CLI and SharpCompress library.

member.name: M:logManager.Exceptions.CompressionException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the compression error.

member.name: M:logManager.Exceptions.CompressionException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception (e.g., Process execution error, library error).

member.name: T:logManager.Exceptions.LogManagerException
member.summary: Base exception class for all logManager module exceptions. Provides a common base for targeted exception handling in user scripts.

member.name: M:logManager.Exceptions.LogManagerException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:logManager.Exceptions.LogManagerException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: T:logManager.Exceptions.TokenResolutionException
member.summary: Exception thrown when path token resolution fails. This occurs when required context values are missing or when tokens cannot be resolved.

member.name: M:logManager.Exceptions.TokenResolutionException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the token resolution error.

member.name: T:logManager.Models.ArchiveInfo
member.summary: Represents a compressed archive created by Compress-Logs cmdlet. Pipeline-compatible for chaining to downstream functions like Send-Archive. Includes compression metrics for observability.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.ArchiveInfo.ArchiveFile
member.summary: The .NET FileInfo object for the created archive file.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.ArchiveInfo.CompressionEngine
member.summary: The compression engine used to create the archive. Either "7-Zip" or "SharpCompress".

member.name: P:logManager.Models.ArchiveInfo.CompressedSize
member.summary: The size of the compressed archive in bytes.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.ArchiveInfo.OriginalSize
member.summary: The total size of the source files before compression in bytes.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.ArchiveInfo.CompressionDuration
member.summary: How long the compression operation took. Useful for performance monitoring and optimization.

member.name: T:logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType
member.summary: Specifies which file date property to use for filtering.

member.name: F:logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType.CreationDate
member.summary: Use the file or folder creation date.

member.name: F:logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType.ModifiedDate
member.summary: Use the file or folder last modified date.

member.name: T:logManager.Models.DateRangeResult
member.summary: Represents a single date in a calculated date range. Returned by Get-DateRange cmdlet and used throughout the pipeline.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.DateRangeResult.Date
member.summary: The date in the range.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.DateRangeResult.Criteria
member.summary: The date criteria type (CreationDate or ModifiedDate) associated with this range.

member.name: T:logManager.Models.LogFileInfo
member.summary: Represents a log file discovered by Find-LogFiles cmdlet. Pipeline-compatible for chaining to downstream functions like Compress-Logs.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.LogFileInfo.File
member.summary: The .NET FileInfo object for the discovered log file.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.LogFileInfo.LogDate
member.summary: The date extracted from the file (either CreationTime or LastWriteTime). This is the date that matched the search criteria.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.LogFileInfo.DateSource
member.summary: Indicates which file date property was used for matching (CreationDate or ModifiedDate).

member.name: T:logManager.Models.LogFolderInfo
member.summary: Represents a dated log folder discovered by Find-LogFolders cmdlet. Pipeline-compatible for chaining to downstream functions like Compress-Logs.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.LogFolderInfo.Folder
member.summary: The .NET DirectoryInfo object for the discovered log folder.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.LogFolderInfo.ParsedDate
member.summary: The date parsed from the folder name.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.LogFolderInfo.FolderNamePattern
member.summary: The folder naming pattern that was detected and parsed. Either "YYYYMMDD" (e.g., 20251008) or "YYYY-MM-DD" (e.g., 2025-10-08).

member.name: T:logManager.Models.TokenResolverContext
member.summary: Context information required for resolving path tokens. Contains the date being archived and optional server/application names.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.TokenResolverContext.LogDate
member.summary: The date of the log being archived (NOT the current date). Used to resolve {year}, {month}, {day}, and {date} tokens.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.TokenResolverContext.ServerName
member.summary: Server name for resolving {server} token. Optional - only required if template contains {server} token.

member.name: P:logManager.Models.TokenResolverContext.ApplicationName
member.summary: Application name for resolving {app} token. Optional - only required if template contains {app} token.

member.name: T:logManager.Services.ArchiveNamingService
member.summary: Service for generating consistent archive filenames. Foundation layer - no dependencies on other services.

member.name: M:logManager.Services.ArchiveNamingService.GetArchiveName(System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Generates an archive filename using the pattern: AppName-YYYYMMDD.zip
member.exception: Thrown when appName is null, empty, or contains invalid filename characters.

member.name: T:logManager.Services.DateRangeCalculator
member.summary: Service for calculating date ranges based on day-based parameters. Foundation layer - no dependencies on other services.

member.name: M:logManager.Services.DateRangeCalculator.Calculate(System.Int32,System.Int32,logManager.Models.DateCriteriaType)
member.summary: Calculates a date range from today going backwards based on olderThan and youngerThan parameters.
member.param: Number of days in the past for the start of the range (oldest date).
Number of days in the past for the end of the range (newest date). Default is 0 (today).
The date criteria type to associate with the results.
member.returns: Array of DateRangeResult objects representing each day in the range (inclusive).
member.exception: Thrown when olderThan is less than youngerThan.

member.name: T:logManager.Services.PathTokenResolver
member.summary: Service for resolving path tokens in destination path templates. Foundation layer - no dependencies on other services.

member.name: M:logManager.Services.PathTokenResolver.ResolveTokens(System.String,logManager.Models.TokenResolverContext)
member.summary: Resolves tokens in a path template using the provided context. Supported tokens: {year}, {month}, {day}, {date}, {server}, {app}
member.param: Context containing date and optional server/application names.
member.returns: The resolved path with all tokens replaced.
member.exception: Thrown when required context is missing for a token in the template.
Thrown when template or context is null.
